indicatorDefinitions.label: Accessibility to Health Services (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Measures the percentage of citizens with healthcare access within a 5 km walking distance.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Accessibility to School Services (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Measures the percentage of citizens with school access within a 5 km walking distance.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Nighttime Luminosity (unit: nWatts/(cm2 x sr)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Measures artificial nighttime light as an measurement of both the degree of electrification and economic development indicator using NASA's Black Marble data.

sources.label: VIIRS Nighttime Day/Night Band Composites Version 1

indicatorDefinitions.label: Luminosity per Capita (unit: nWatts/(cm2 x sr x person))
indicatorDefinitions.description: Nighttime Luminosity normalized to the region's Total Population.

sources.label: VIIRS Nighttime Day/Night Band Composites Version 1

indicatorDefinitions.label: Luminosity per Area (unit: nWatts/(cm2 x sr x km2))
indicatorDefinitions.description: Nighttime Luminosity normalized to the region's Total Area.

sources.label: VIIRS Nighttime Day/Night Band Composites Version 1

indicatorDefinitions.label: Average Broadband Download Speed (unit: megabites per second)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Calculates the average broadband speed for key structures like schools and hospitals.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Average Cellular Download Speed (unit: megabites per second)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Measures average mobile download speeds across sub-national regions.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Key Structures without Internet Access (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Shows the percentage of hospitals and schools lacking broadband internet access.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Road Flood Risk (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Assesses the share of the region's total length of railway exposure to 1-in-100-year flood risks for climate adaptation planning

sources.label: WRI Aqueduct Floods Hazard Maps Version 2

indicatorDefinitions.label: Road Heatwave Risk (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Assesses the share of the region's total length of road exposure to 1-in-100-year flood risks for climate adaptation planning

indicatorDefinitions.label: Railway Flood Risk (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Percentage of railway length at risk from 1-in-100-year flood risks for climate adaptation planning.

sources.label: WRI Aqueduct Floods Hazard Maps Version 2

indicatorDefinitions.label: Railway Heatwave Risk (unit: %)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Measures road length at risk from heatwaves in high-emission climate scenarios

indicatorDefinitions.label: PM 2.5 concentration (unit: µg/m3)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Calculates average annual PM 2.5 concentration in sub-national regions, a key health risk factor.

indicatorDefinitions.label: CO2-Equivalent Emissions per Area (unit: tonnes/km2)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Total CO2-equivalent emissions from all sources in the region.

indicatorDefinitions.label: Change in Build Area (%)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Change detected in the amount of land use for man-made structures compared to 2017

indicatorDefinitions.label: Change in Forest Area (%)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Change detected in the amount of land use for forested area compared to 2017

indicatorDefinitions.label: Total Land Area for Agricultural Use (km2)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Total area of land used for agricultural purposes

indicatorDefinitions.label: Number of Tourism POIs
indicatorDefinitions.description: Number of Points of Interests used for Tourism

indicatorDefinitions.label: CO2-Equivalent Emissions (tonnes)
indicatorDefinitions.description: Total CO2-Equivalent emissions for 100 years variant

metrics.label: Luminosity per Capita (unit: nWatts/(cm2 x sr x person))
Luminosity per Area (unit: nWatts/(cm2 x sr x km2))
Average Broadband Download Speed (unit: megabites per second)
Average Cellular Download Speed (unit: megabites per second)
Total Land Area for Agricultural Use (km2)
